creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/564c5314f6d9aa2b20ebd437b86fe441e967ada1> notes OpenSSL 3.0 in base. 

My use of poudriere-bulk(8) failed as shown below. 


root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # poudriere ports -u && poudriere bulk -j main -b latest -J 8 -Ct emulators/virtualbox-ose-kmod graphics/drm-510-kmod graphics/drm-515-kmod
[00:00:00] Updating portstree "default" with git+https... done
[00:00:00] Creating the reference jail... done
[00:00:01] Mounting system devices for main-default
[00:00:01] Warning: Using packages from previously failed, or uncommitted, build: /usr/local/poudriere/data/packages/main-default/.building
[00:00:02] Mounting ccache from: /usr/.ccache
[00:00:02] Mounting ports from: /usr/local/poudriere/ports/default
[00:00:02] Mounting packages from: /usr/local/poudriere/data/packages/main-default
[00:00:02] Mounting distfiles from: /usr/ports/distfiles
[00:00:02] Copying /var/db/ports from: /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/main-options
[00:00:02] Appending to make.conf: /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/make.conf
/etc/resolv.conf -> /usr/local/poudriere/data/.m/main-default/ref/etc/resolv.conf
[00:00:02] Starting jail main-default
[00:00:02] Will build as nobody:nobody (65534:65534)
[00:00:07] Logs: /usr/local/poudriere/data/logs/bulk/main-default/2023-06-27_06h30m04s
[00:00:07] Loading MOVED for /usr/local/poudriere/data/.m/main-default/ref/usr/ports
[00:00:09] Ports supports: FLAVORS SELECTED_OPTIONS
[00:00:09] Inspecting ports tree for modifications to git checkout... yes
[00:02:27] Ports top-level git hash: 4c9b7b2320 (dirty)

[00:02:31] newer version of jail, cleaning all packages... done
[00:02:38] -C specified, cleaning listed packages
[00:02:38] (-C) Flushing package deletions
[00:02:38] Trimming IGNORED and blacklisted ports
[00:02:38] Package fetch: Looking for missing packages to fetch from pkg+http://pkg.FreeBSD.org/${ABI}/latest
[00:02:38] Packge fetch: bootstrapping pkg
Bootstrapping pkg from pkg+http://pkg.FreeBSD.org/FreeBSD:14:amd64/latest, please wait...

main-default: removed
main-default-n: removed

Exiting with status 1
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # pkg iinfo poudriere
poudriere-devel-3.3.99.20220831
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # uname -aKU
FreeBSD mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd 14.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #0 main-n263799-f81be7a8318b-dirty: Mon Jun 26 22:09:58 BST 2023     grahamperrin@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC amd64 1400092 1400090
root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # poudriere jail -i -j main
